heading: Atlas Private Endpoint
body:
Atlas charges hourly for each region to which you deploy a private
endpoint. The  [hourly cost](psc-region-rates) varies by region.

> **Note:** While Atlas creates 50 load balancers and service attachments for
> each region, Atlas does not charge for
> each load balancer and service attachement individually. Atlas
> charges a flat hourly rate for the entire region.
